task: Filter handbags to show evening bags that are gold, made of satin, and priced under $100.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to JCPenney handbags, selected the Evening Bag/Dress category, applied the gold color filter, applied the satin fabric filter, and set the price filter to under $100. Final page evidence shows heading 'View All Gold Satin Dress Handbags & Wallets' with active filter chips including 'satin', 'gold', 'dress', and '$1 - $99', and 8 results displayed. This satisfies the task to filter handbags to show evening bags that are gold, made of satin, and priced under $100.
final_result_response:
Done. JCPenney is filtered to:

- Handbags
- Evening/Dress bags
- Gold
- Satin
- $1 to $99

It shows 8 results.
action_history: Opening JCPenney: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.jcpenney.com/');
Clicking satin filter by text: await page.getByText('satin(8)', { exact: true }).click({timeout: 10000});
Selecting satin after scrolling: await satinLabel1.click({ force: true });
Opening price range filter: await page.locator('e40').click();
Applying under $100 price filter: await page.locator('e708').fill('100');
Applying under $100 price filter: await page.locator('e709').click();
Tightening price filter below $100: await page.locator('e708').fill('99');
Tightening price filter below $100: await page.locator('e709').click();
